channel.title: Etl on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Etl on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Inštalácia Airflow
item.description: Inštalácia systémových balíkov apt install -y default-libmysqlclient-dev build-essential Inštalácia samotného Airflow cd /niekam/ python3 -m venv . ./bin/pip3 install apache-airflow[mysql] ./airflow db init Úprava konfigurácie Otvoríme súbor vi ../home/airflow/airflow.cfg a nastavíme v nom sql_alchemy_conn = mysql+mysqldb://airflow_user:your_secure_password@localhost:3306/airflow_db executor = LocalExecutor Inicializácia databáze ./airflow db init Pridanie účtu ./airflow users create your_username --firstname first_name --lastname last_name --role Admin --email username@example.com

item.title: IBM Datastage manual
item.description: Status Name Status Code Explanation DSJS.RUNNING 0 Job is actually running DSJS.RUNOK 1 Job finished a normal run with no warnings DSJS.RUNWARN 2 Job finished a normal run with warnings DSJS.RUNFAILED 3 Job finished a normal run with a fatal error DSJS.QUEUED 4 Job queued waiting for resource allocation DSJS.VALOK 11 Job finished a validation run with no warnings DSJS.VALWARN 12 Job finished a validation run with warnings DSJS.VALFAILED 13 Job failed a validation run DSJS.
